title: Could you be the next big winner?
description: BUSINESS NEWS - ITHUBA, the proud operator...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - ITHUBA, the proud operator of the National Lottery, is thrilled to announce that the PowerBall jackpot has soared to an estimated R100m for the draw on Friday, 24 January 2025. This is the biggest jackpot of the year so far, setting an exciting tone for 2025!


> The last PowerBall jackpot, a massive R77,428,794.30, was won by one lucky participant in Draw 1566 on 26 November 2024. After 16 rollovers, the estimated jackpot has grown to a record-breaking R100m, offering participants a chance to experience life-changing rewards.


Participants can buy tickets in participating retail stores nationally, on digital platforms of participating banks (Absa, Standard Bank, Nedbank, Old Mutual, African Bank, Tyme Bank, and FNB), on the National Lottery website or Mobile App, or via USSD by dialling 1207527#. Tickets cost R5 per board.

Charmaine Mabuza, CEO of ITHUBA, expressed her enthusiasm, saying, “Hearing how our winners’ lives are positively impacted is what drives us to continue working hard to offer these significant jackpots. ITHUBA has ensured an inclusive Lottery for all through our convenient ways in which participants can buy tickets. We are excited to witness a celebration of a possible big win.", said Mabuza.

Could you be the next big winner? Secure your PowerBall ticket today! Ticket sales close at 20:30 on Friday, 24 January 2025!

Players must be 18 years or older to participate. Play responsibly.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
